profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Manage account details, security settings, language, currency, and connected login methods.
profile.walletDescription: Balance is read-only here. View full transactions in Wallet.

basicInfo.title: Basic Information
basicInfo.name: Name
basicInfo.avatarHelp: V1.0 uses URL input. File upload can be connected later.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.languageDescription: Choose the language used across your account pages.
preferences.currencyDescription: Select the currency shown for account balances and payments.
preferences.themeDescription: Switch the appearance of your account pages.
preferences.orderEmailsDescription: Receive important order, package, wallet, and ticket updates.
preferences.marketingEmailsDescription: Receive promotions, service updates, and occasional shopping offers.

security.title: Security
security.googleOnlyWarning: This account currently uses Google login only. Set a password before disconnecting the only login method.

dialog.title: Change Password
dialog.description: Use at least 8 characters. Avoid reusing passwords from other sites.

dangerZone.title: Danger Zone
dangerZone.description: Account disabling and deletion are request-based in V1.0. Deleting an account can affect orders, packages, wallet records, tickets, and historical audit data.
dangerZone.disableDescription: This action is coming soon. Support will need to review account status and open orders first.
dangerZone.deleteDescription: Deletion requests will be blocked when the account has unfinished orders, undelivered packages, or wallet balance.
dangerZone.cannotDelete: Accounts with unfinished orders or undelivered packages cannot be deleted directly.

connectedAccounts.title: Connected Accounts
connectedAccounts.disconnectWarning: Set a password before disconnecting your only login method.
connectedAccounts.disconnectInfo: Disconnect Google action is reserved for API connection.
connectedAccounts.connectInfo: Connect Google action is reserved for NextAuth OAuth flow.

page.title: My Orders
page.description: Only your own shopping agent orders are shown here. Search by order number and filter by current workflow status.

page.title: Wallet
page.description: View your available balance, reserved amount, and wallet transaction history.
page.rechargeSuccess: Recharge completed successfully. Your CNSnap Balance has been updated.
page.balancePaymentSuccess: Payment completed successfully with CNSnap Balance.

page.title: My Packages
page.description: View parcels created from your orders, pay international shipping fees, and track dispatched packages.

alert.title: One or more packages are waiting for international shipping payment.
alert.description: Open the package details and complete the second payment for international freight so we can dispatch your parcel.

page.title: Recharge
page.description: Top up your CNSnap Balance with the payment methods enabled by the admin team. Not every payment gateway supports recharge mode.

methods.onlypayDescription: Use online card and wallet checkout for instant recharge.
methods.paypalAdvancedDescription: Recharge with PayPal wallet or eligible card fields.
methods.bankTransferDescription: Manual confirmation after the transfer reaches our finance team.

form.title: Create Recharge Request
form.amountHelp: Funds are credited after manual payment confirmation.

panel.title: Add funds
panel.description: Choose a preset or custom amount, then select how you want to pay.
panel.minimumError: Please enter a recharge amount of at least $5.
panel.paypalHint: Use the PayPal panel below to approve and complete this recharge.

page.title: Affiliate
page.description: Share your referral link and track commission records.

orderDetail.description: Review your live order details, payments, shipping address, and workflow progress.

payment.paypalPaid: Payment completed successfully. We updated the order and will continue the purchasing workflow.
payment.balancePaid: CNSnap Balance payment completed successfully. We updated your order and will continue the workflow.
payment.sepaSubmitted: SEPA transfer submitted. We will verify the bank transfer and update this order after it arrives.

nextStep.warehouseArrivalTitle: Your items have arrived at our warehouse.
nextStep.warehouseArrivalDescription: We will inspect the goods, prepare the parcel, and confirm the international shipping fee. After that, you will need to pay the shipping fee before dispatch.
nextStep.preparingParcelTitle: We are preparing your parcel and shipping fee.
nextStep.preparingParcelDescription: Our warehouse team is measuring the parcel and confirming the final international shipping fee. Please wait for the shipping payment request.
nextStep.shippingPaymentDescription: Your parcel is ready for the next step. Please pay the international shipping fee so we can dispatch it.
nextStep.shippingPaidTitle: Shipping fee paid. We will arrange dispatch next.
nextStep.shippingPaidDescription: Your parcel is queued for carrier handoff. We will update tracking once it has been shipped.

cards.productItemsDescription: All product lines, selected SKUs, source links, and per-line totals are shown here.

states.noNote: No note left for this order.
states.noPackages: No package has been created yet.

packageDetail.description: Package details are read-only for customers. Contact support if you need help with shipping or tracking.

payment.paypalPaid: Shipping payment completed successfully. We updated your package and will move it toward dispatch.
payment.balancePaid: Shipping payment completed successfully with CNSnap Balance. Your package is ready for the next dispatch step.
payment.sepaSubmitted: Shipping payment transfer submitted. We will verify it and update your package after confirmation.
payment.pending: This package is waiting for international shipping payment. Complete the freight payment before dispatch can begin.

page.title: Addresses
page.description: Manage shipping addresses used for checkout, parcel delivery, and warehouse shipping estimates.
page.noSavedDescription: Add a shipping address before checkout or international parcel payment.

card.unsupportedWarning: This country is not enabled in the current shipping countries list. You can save it, but parcel shipment may require a manual quote.

dialog.description: Countries are currently validated against the active shipping-country mock list. Unsupported destinations can still be saved for later manual quote.
dialog.unsupportedCountry: Shipping is not currently available for {country} in the mock shipping countries list.

fields.address2Help: Apartment, suite, company, or delivery note.
fields.isDefaultHelp: Default address is used first during checkout and shipping estimate.

toast.mustKeepOne: At least one address must remain as your default shipping address.

page.title: Tickets Center
page.description: Submit and track support requests for orders, packages, payments, refunds, DIY orders, and account issues.

reply.closed: This ticket is closed and cannot receive new replies.
reply.reopenInfo: Reopen Ticket action is reserved for API connection.
reply.resolvedInfo: Ticket marked as resolved in mock mode.
reply.closeInfo: Close Ticket action is reserved for API connection.
reply.submitted: Reply submitted. The conversation will update after API connection.

detail.notFoundDescription: This ticket does not exist or is not available in your account.
detail.ownershipHint: Only tickets owned by the signed-in user will be visible after API connection.

newForm.pageDescription: Tell support what happened. Link an order or package so the team can work faster.
newForm.subject: Subject
newForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what happened, what order or package is affected, and what result you expect.
newForm.relatedOrderHelp: Auto-filled when opened from an order.
newForm.relatedPackageHelp: Auto-filled when opened from a package.
newForm.attachmentHelp: V1.0 accepts a reference URL. File upload can be connected later.
newForm.created: Ticket created. Support will review it shortly.

page.title: DIY Orders
page.description: Track manual quotation requests and special purchasing support submitted to the team.

newPage.title: Submit DIY Order
newPage.description: Send us a product link, image, specifications, and shipping requirements so the team can review and quote it.

dashboard.title: Willkommen zurueck, {name}
dashboard.description: Behalte deine Einkaufsanfragen, Pakete, dein Wallet-Guthaben und Support-Aktivitaeten in einem klaren Arbeitsbereich im Blick.

order.title: Du hast eine Bestellung mit ausstehender Zahlung
order.description: Bei Bestellung {orderNo} sind noch ${amount} offen, bevor der Einkauf fortgesetzt werden kann.

shipping.title: Du hast offene Versandgebuehren
shipping.description: Paket {packageNo} wartet auf die internationale Versandzahlung in Hoehe von ${amount}.
